import SabayNews from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay.png'
import SabayDer from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-der.png'
import SabayKleyKley from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-kleykley.png'
import SabayNovel from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-novel.png'
import SabayEntertain from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-entertain.png'
import SabayTech from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-tech.png'
import SabaySocial from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-social.png'
import SabaySport from '../assets/icon-images/saby-cooperation-icon/sabay-sport.png'

import Facebook from '../assets/icon-images/social-icon/facebook.png'
import Instagram from '../assets/icon-images/social-icon/instagram.png'
import Youtube from '../assets/icon-images/social-icon/youtube.png'

export const cooperationIconData = [
    { icon: SabayNews , alt: "sabay-news" },
    { icon: SabayDer , alt: "sabay-der" },
    { icon: SabayKleyKley , alt: "sabay-kleykley" },
    { icon: SabayNovel , alt: "sabay-novel" },
    { icon: SabayEntertain , alt: "sabay-entertain" },
    { icon: SabayTech , alt: "sabay-tech" },
    { icon: SabaySocial , alt: "sabay-social" },
    { icon: SabaySport , alt: "sabay-sport" },
];

export const socialIconData = [
    { icon: Facebook , alt: "facebook" },
    { icon: Instagram , alt: "instagram" },
    { icon: Youtube , alt: "youtube" },
];
